commit.subject: LU-15096 ldlm: call reprocess on reply error
commit.message:
LU-15096 ldlm: call reprocess on reply error

We can reduce reprocess cases added by LU-14522
On reply error the lock is destroyed, so call
reprocess even if cbpending flag is present.

Fixes: 9cc7128b9b2b ("LU-14522 ldlm: reprocess locks if enqueue failed")
